description: This file provides an overview of the Final Year Project Management System, outlining its purpose, key features, and expected outcomes.

This is rhe description of the project:
Final Year Project Management System
## Overview
A web-based platform to streamline the supervision and submission process for final year projects.
The system allows students to submit proposals, upload progress documents, receive feedback,
track milestones, and chat with supervisors. Supervisors can monitor project stages, comment on
submissions, assign tasks, and grade progress.
## Problem & Solution
Project supervision often suffers from scattered communication, delayed feedback, and
disorganized records. This system solves the problem by centralizing proposals, documents,
progress tracking, and supervisor feedback in one structured portal.
## Key Features
•⁠  ⁠Student-supervisor messaging system
•⁠  ⁠Document upload and version control
•⁠  ⁠Task deadlines and progress tracking
•⁠  ⁠Supervisor feedback and grading
•⁠  ⁠Admin dashboard for project oversight
## Expected Outcome
Improved supervision efficiency, accountability, and timely feedback. Students and supervisors
benefit from organized communication and structured progress tracking.
## Why It Matters
This solution reduces miscommunication and delays, and can be scaled for use across
departments, improving the overall quality of academic supervision.

## Important Info
- Follow the project standrds of using services to abstract direct database interactions that require using db.query(modelname) straight up and business logic, and routes to handle HTTP requests and responses.
